debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
⊢ Submartingale (fun i ω => ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨fun i ↦ (continuous_norm.pow 2).comp_stronglyMeasurable
    (hX.martingale.stronglyAdapted i), fun i j hij ↦ ?_, hX.integrable_sq⟩
  change (fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ≤ᵐ[P] P[fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | 𝓕 i]
  by_cases hsf : SigmaFinite (P.trim (𝓕.le i))
  · haveI : SigmaFinite P := by
      obtain ⟨⟨S⟩⟩ := hsf
      exact ⟨⟨⟨S.set, fun _ ↦ Set.mem_univ _,
        fun n ↦ lt_of_le_of_lt (le_trim (𝓕.le i)) (S.finite n), S.spanning⟩⟩⟩
    calc (fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2)
        =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ ‖(P[X j | 𝓕 i]) ω‖ ^ 2 :=
          (hX.martingale.condExp_ae_eq hij).symm.fun_comp (fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2)
      _ ≤ᵐ[P] P[fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | 𝓕 i] := by
          have hcvx : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ (fun x : E ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) := by
            convert convexOn_univ_norm (E := E).pow (fun x _ ↦ norm_nonneg x) 2 using 1
          exact conditional_jensen (𝓕.le i) hcvx (continuous_norm.pow 2).lowerSemicontinuous
            (hX.martingale.integrable j) (hX.integrable_sq j)
  · rw [condExp_of_not_sigmaFinite (𝓕.le i) hsf]
    have hXi : X i =ᵐ[P] 0 := by
      have := hX.martingale.condExp_ae_eq hij
      rw [condExp_of_not_sigmaFinite (𝓕.le i) hsf] at this; exact this.symm
    exact hXi.mono fun ω hω ↦ by simp [hω]
